channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: This travel site is the Google Maps helper you never knew you needed
item.description: Trying to get from point A to point B? If only it were that simple! With any manner of travel these days, you’ve got options: planes, trains, buses, ferries, and beyond. And finding the best path to embark on isn’t always easy. Even finding all the available options can sometimes be a pain.
item.dc:creator: Chris Hoffman, Fast Company

item.title: This music streamer is giving its users a version of Spotify Wrapped every month
item.description: With music streaming, users have gotten used to being at the mercy of algorithms. But French music streamer Deezer is making it easier for its subscribers to make the algorithm work for them.
item.dc:creator: Lana Tleimat, Fast Company

item.title: Find these 6 Easter eggs on your iPhone or Mac
item.description: If real Easter eggs aren’t your thing this weekend, you may find hunting for digital ones more enjoyable. And there are some cool ones to find at your fingertips, provided you have an iPhone or Mac.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: Shrinking season 3: everything we know about what's coming next for the Apple TV+ show
item.description: Shrinking is officially back in production – here’s everything we know about the third season of Apple’s hit therapy series.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Bay Area art school closures continue as Contra Costa School of Performing Arts takes its curtain call
item.description: For nearly a decade, the nonprofit charter school offered a free, project-based learning environment for young artists to explore courses in dance, instrumental and vocal music, theater production, and design.
item.dc:creator: Katie Lauer, The Mercury News

item.title: FoxNews AI Newsletter: 'Terminator' director James Cameron flip-flops on AI, says Hollywood is 'looking at it
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: ICYMI: the 8 biggest tech stories of the week, from new ChatGPT upgrades to Polaroid's latest instant camera
item.description: We're just about catching our breath again from the latest week in tech – and these were the biggest stories.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: A TikToker sues Roblox for using her viral Charli XCX dance without permission
item.description: If you thought you’d heard the last of the viral “Apple” dance, think again. The TikToker behind it is now suing Roblox over its unauthorized use.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: From Copilot to agent – AI is growing up, and CISOs need to be ready
item.description: Over the past year, CISOs have wrestled with integrating AI into security processes, balancing the promised efficiencies with the need for stringent testing and adherence to security protocols. Hot on the heels of this integration effort comes another innovation: agentic AI.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Discord accused of exposing kids to graphic, violent content in lawsuit
item.description: New Jersey Attorney General Matthew Platkin filed a lawsuit against Discord on Thursday, alleging the popular messaging app misled parents about its safety features.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Samsung's latest smartphone has a very simple feature that no other Samsung phone offers right now
item.description: Samsung brings back the removable battery with the rugged Galaxy XCover7 Pro, offering reliability and endurance in challenging work environments.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: When Do You Start Panicking About a Low Phone Battery Life?
item.description: A new study from Talker Research reveals when people start worrying about low phone battery life, and offers tips for extending charge on both iOS and Android devices.
item.dc:creator: lance.ulanoff@futurenet.com (Lance Ulanoff), TechRadar

item.title: Pentagon to establish secure software assurance program
item.description: Rob Vietmeyer, the chief software officer for DoD, said the department will issue criteria for vendors to ensure that their applications are secure. The post Pentagon to establish secure software assurance program first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Trump administration replaces federal COVID-19 response page with 'lab leak' explainer
item.description: The Trump White House on Friday replaced the covid.gov website that provided resources and information on COVID-19 with a webpage promoting the theory that the pandemic was a result of a laboratory leak in Wuhan, China, which a House GOP panel strongly favored in a report released last year.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Choi, The Hill

item.title: Nintendo Switch 2 pre-order details have been updated with a new date
item.description: Pre-orders for the highly anticipated console will now begin on April 24, 2025 and accessories will bear the brunt of tariffs
item.dc:creator: Gieson Cacho, The Mercury News

item.title: Everything leaving Hulu in May 2025
item.description: Hulu has announced all the titles leaving the platform in May 2025 – and there's a surprising amount of documentaries in here.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: Dell data center modernization gear targets AI, HPC workloads
item.description: Dell Technology has introduced a raft of new products aimed at advancing customers’ data center modernization projects capable of supporting a variety of workloads, from virtualization and database management to AI inferencing and high-performance computing (HPC).
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Google US antitrust trials: A timeline
item.description: Google’s dominance in the search arena has given rise to two major antitrust lawsuits from the US government alleging the company has manipulated the market to maintain that dominance, to the exclusion of competitors and the detriment of the public at large.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Caltrans using remote-controlled equipment to help clear Highway 1 slide near Big Sur
item.description: Regent’s Slide — post mile 27.8 — occurred March 9, 2024, and started seeing top-down removal of slide material by crews on April 30, 2024. The slide originated 450 feet above the roadway displacing material that engulfed Highway 1 and continuing down to the beach and ocean below.
item.dc:creator: James Herrera, The Mercury News

item.title: Entertainment venue management giant Legends International reveals major data breach
item.description: Company lost sensitive data in the November 2024 breach, and is now notifying potentially affected individuals.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Tesla really wants you to buy its Cybertruck, with huge discounts and perks thrown in to clear its growing inventory
item.description: Tesla is offering big discounts and free lifetime charging with new Cybertruck, but it's likely not enough to save its steel.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The US has a single rare earths mine. Chinese export limits are energizing a push for more
item.description: OMAHA, Neb. (AP) — America’s only rare earths mine heard from anxious companies soon after China responded to President Donald Trump’s tariffs this month by limiting exports of those minerals used for military applications and in many high-tech devices.
item.dc:creator: JOSH FUNK, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Walmart opens South Bay tech hub in expansion for its web unit
item.description: Walmart has started moving employees into a huge tech hub in Sunnyvale where the retail titan could employ thousands of workers.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: This Tie Fighter stand for the Echo Dot lets your Alexa smart speaker join the dark side
item.description: Amazon just dropped a Tie Fighter Stand for the Echo Dot, and a number of items from Star Wars Celebration 2025 are now up for order.
item.dc:creator: jacob.krol@futurenet.com (Jacob Krol), TechRadar

item.title: SpaceX is the top contender to build Trump’s ‘Golden Dome’ missile shield, sources say
item.description: Elon Musk’s SpaceX and two partners have emerged as frontrunners to win a crucial part of President Donald Trump’s “Golden Dome” missile defense shield, six people familiar with the matter said.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Meta CEO Zuckerberg considered spinning off Instagram in 2018 over antitrust worries, email says
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg once considered separating Instagram from its parent company due to worries about antitrust litigation, according to an email shown Tuesday on the second day of an antitrust trial alleging Meta illegally monopolized the social media market.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN WITTE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg takes the stand in historic antitrust trial
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg took to the witness stand on the first day of a historic antitrust trial to defend his company against allegations it illegally monopolized the social media market.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN WITTE and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Accelerate Together
item.description: CrowdStrike’s field tech strategist explains how AWS Control Tower plus CrowdStrike Falcon lets new workloads inherit access controls in zero trust environments The post Accelerate Together — Zero Trust 2025: CrowdStrike’s Dennen Monks on ensuring none of your assets escape zero trust coverage first
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Intel sells majority stake in Altera to Silver Lake investors in a deal valued at $8.75 billion
item.description: Intel announced Monday that it was selling the majority of its Altera chip business to technology investor Silver Lake in a deal valued at $8.75 billion.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: NAVWAR using Catapult to find SBIR technologies faster
item.description: Shadi Azoum, the NAVWAR’s program manager for the SBIR/STTR programs, said about 60% of their entire SBIR and STTR awards take advantage of Catapult. The post NAVWAR using Catapult to find SBIR technologies faster first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Keysight tools tackle data center deployment efficiency
item.description: Test and performance measurement vendor Keysight Technologies has developed Keysight Artificial Intelligence (KAI) to identify performance inhibitors affecting large GPU deployments. It emulates workload profiles, rather than using actual resources, to pinpoint performance bottlenecks.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How pet projects fuel innovation and careers in tech
item.description: Call them pet projects, side projects, or hobby projects, projects pursued outside of one’s regular business activity are especially popular among software developers. After all, these projects serve as an excellent way to learn new skills and technologies or to test fresh concepts and approaches.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Japanese leader says he hopes Osaka expo will help reunite a divided world
item.description: OSAKA, Japan (AP) — Japanese Prime Minister Shigeru Ishiba, speaking at Saturday's opening ceremony for the Osaka expo, expressed his hope that the event will help restore global unity in a world plagued by conflicts and trade wars.
item.dc:creator: AYAKA McGILL and MARI YAMAGUCHI, Associated Press, ABC 4
